operatingRule: Zero unpaid interaction: no free calls, no bespoke advice in DMs, no unpaid document reviews.

dailyTheme.buyerProblem: Process mining shows variation, but automation benefits do not land unless Finance standardises the right work first.
dailyTheme.audience: Finance Process Owner, GBS Finance, Controller
dailyTheme.proofAngle: The practical sequence is map the work, understand variation, standardise what matters, then automate stable patterns.
dailyTheme.cta: Use the assistant to frame the process question; use the Diagnostic Pack to decide the roadmap and adoption path.

secondaryTheme.buyerProblem: Finance AI risk increases when controls are added after the pilot rather than designed into the workflow.
secondaryTheme.audience: Controller, Finance Risk, Finance Transformation Director
secondaryTheme.proofAngle: Trust is created by evidence: decision rights, escalation rules, audit trail and quality checks.
secondaryTheme.cta: If controls and adoption are blocking scale, start with the $750 Diagnostic Pack.

dailyActions: Schedule or publish one ready post.
Use the remaining posts as comments or queue material.
Paste inbound LinkedIn messages into Inbound Triage before replying.
Only route high-intent contacts to the paid Diagnostic Pack.
Send possible-fit contacts to the free assistant first.
Generate a bounded follow-up for any buyer who engaged but did not book.
Export the console report at week end.

followUps.draft:
Thanks for taking a look at the AI Finance Diagnostic Pack.

If this is a live Finance AI decision, the next step is deliberately simple: book the fixed-price pack and use the diagnostic tool before the session so the paid hour focuses on judgement, sequencing and next actions.

Diagnostic Pack: https://calendly.com/gilles-bonelli/applied-ai-coaching-session-clone

If you are not ready to book, use the free assistant first to sharpen the question.

Good first step using the AI Finance Playbook / resources.

The point of the free preparation is to sharpen the question, not to replace tailored judgement. If the issue now feels live enough to need an independent view, the paid Diagnostic Pack is the route I use.

Diagnostic Pack: https://calendly.com/gilles-bonelli/applied-ai-coaching-session-clone

This sounds relevant, but perhaps not yet urgent enough for paid diagnostic work.

A useful self-serve next step is to clarify which Finance decision or process is affected, what would make the use case valuable, and what adoption, data or control risk would stop it landing.

When this becomes a live decision, the paid Diagnostic Pack is the route for tailored judgement.

Thanks for reaching out. I am focused on paid AI Finance Transformation advisory for senior Finance leaders with live roadmap, adoption, governance or operating model questions, so I am probably not the right route for this.

You may still find the free resources useful here: https://www.seethenextmove.com/

disqualifiers: no ability or willingness to pay

posts.draft:
The real Finance AI opportunity is not generic productivity. It is removing the work that drains CFO time and team capacity.

CFO pain map: Layer 3 - what threatens your seat.

Problem to solve: the board sees finance as a cost centre.

Practical move: make Finance AI measurable through better decisions, faster cycle times, stronger controls and visible enterprise value.

Roadmap lens: The practical sequence is map the work, understand variation, standardise what matters, then automate stable patterns.

Audience this matters for: Finance Process Owner, GBS Finance, Controller.

Bounded next step: Use the assistant to frame the process question; use the Diagnostic Pack to decide the roadmap and adoption path.

Diagnostic Pack: https://calendly.com/gilles-bonelli/applied-ai-coaching-session-clone

Before funding another AI Finance pilot, ask whether it will materially reduce a named Finance pain.

CFO pain map: Layer 3 - what threatens your seat.

Problem to solve: CFO decisions being made without reliable data.

Practical move: fix decision-grade data, assumptions and confidence levels before using AI outputs in high-stakes decisions.

Roadmap lens: The practical sequence is map the work, understand variation, standardise what matters, then automate stable patterns.

Audience this matters for: Finance Process Owner, GBS Finance, Controller.

Bounded next step: Use the assistant to frame the process question; use the Diagnostic Pack to decide the roadmap and adoption path.

Diagnostic Pack: https://calendly.com/gilles-bonelli/applied-ai-coaching-session-clone

A Finance AI roadmap should start where the pain is visible.

CFO pain map: Layer 3 - what threatens your seat.

Problem to solve: Finance not being in the room when strategy is set.

Practical move: move Finance from reporting to decision architecture by owning the roadmap, value logic and risk lens.

Roadmap lens: The practical sequence is map the work, understand variation, standardise what matters, then automate stable patterns.

Audience this matters for: Finance Process Owner, GBS Finance, Controller.

Bounded next step: Use the assistant to frame the process question; use the Diagnostic Pack to decide the roadmap and adoption path.

Diagnostic Pack: https://calendly.com/gilles-bonelli/applied-ai-coaching-session-clone

When Finance is still dealing with this problem, AI is not the starting point. Workflow design is.

CFO pain map: Layer 1 - what eats your calendar.

Problem to solve: chasing approvals over email.

Practical move: turn approvals into a governed workflow with clear owners, thresholds and escalation rules before layering AI on top.

Roadmap lens: Trust is created by evidence: decision rights, escalation rules, audit trail and quality checks.

Audience this matters for: Controller, Finance Risk, Finance Transformation Director.

Bounded next step: If controls and adoption are blocking scale, start with the $750 Diagnostic Pack.

Diagnostic Pack: https://calendly.com/gilles-bonelli/applied-ai-coaching-session-clone

One reason AI Finance pilots stall: they do not solve a painful enough Finance problem.

CFO pain map: Layer 1 - what eats your calendar.

Problem to solve: explaining variances nobody acts on.

Practical move: redesign variance analysis around decision triggers, accountable owners and exception-based commentary.

Roadmap lens: Trust is created by evidence: decision rights, escalation rules, audit trail and quality checks.

Audience this matters for: Controller, Finance Risk, Finance Transformation Director.

Bounded next step: If controls and adoption are blocking scale, start with the $750 Diagnostic Pack.

Diagnostic Pack: https://calendly.com/gilles-bonelli/applied-ai-coaching-session-clone
